title: Tender Spicy Light Bake Brussels Sprouts
description: A spicy and tender brussels sprout dish baked to perfection, reminiscent of a Jamaican-inspired treat for dinner.
instructions: Slice the brussels sprouts in half and remove any damaged outer leaves. Rinse them thoroughly under cold water.
In a mixing bowl, combine salt, pepper, coconut oil, spices, and olive oil. Mix well until evenly distributed.
Add the brussels sprouts to the bowl and coat each piece with the seasoning mixture.
Place the seasoned brussels sprouts on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper in a single layer.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until they are golden brown and tender. Stir occasionally during cooking to ensure even browning.
Serve hot as an accompaniment to your dinner.
